title: SLMS Portal Currently Operational for Monitoring Various Stages of Subordinate Legislations
text:
Press Release Page | Press Information Bureau

Ministry of Parliamentary Affairs

SLMS Portal Currently Operational for Monitoring Various Stages of Subordinate Legislations

Posted On:
02 APR 2026 1:58PM by PIB Delhi

Subordinate Legislation Management System (SLMS) Portal is currently operational for monitoring the various stages of subordinate legislations like framing/drafting, laying, vetting and notification based on the recommendation of the Committee of Subordinate Legislation, Lok Sabha.

Credentials have been shared with all the stakeholders comprising of Rajya Sabha Secretariat, Lok Sabha Secretariat, Cabinet Secretariat, Legislative Department and all other Ministries/Departments under Government of India. The Ministry of Parliamentary Affairs has also organized a training cum workshop for all stakeholders.

SLMS portal was developed with an aim for enabling all stakeholders to monitor the progress of the various stages of subordinate legislations for timely compliance. As on date, progress of 86 Subordinate Legislations are available on the Portal.

This information was given by the Minister of State (Independent Charge) of law and justice; and the Minister of State of parliamentary affairs, Shri Arjun Ram Meghwal in a written reply in Lok Sabha today.

***
